name: clawrouter
description: Smart LLM router — your API keys, intelligent routing, maximum savings. No crypto required.

scripts.build: bun build --target=node --outdir=dist --splitting --sourcemap src/index.ts && bun build --target=node --outdir=dist --sourcemap src/cli.ts
scripts.typecheck: bun build --target=node --outdir=/tmp/clawrouter-check src/index.ts src/cli.ts 2>&1 && echo 'Build successful' || echo 'Build failed'
